headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for the iRobot Roomba 692 (600-series). Requires the robot's BLID and local password — see the [README](https://github.com/HumanElement-Dev/Homebridge-Roomba-692#getting-your-blid-and-password) for how to get them.

ipaddress.title: IP Address
ipaddress.description: Robot's local IP address. A static DHCP reservation is recommended.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model string shown in the Home app.

pollInterval.title: Idle Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll the robot when docked/idle.

activePollInterval.title: Active Poll Interval (seconds)
activePollInterval.description: How often to poll the robot while it's cleaning, returning to dock, or stuck.
